title: All impls: Per-neighbor SF tracking
description:
Implement per-neighbor SF tracking and adaptation.

## Shared logic
1. NeighborTable entry gains (sf, snr_avg, last_update) fields
2. On RX: update SNR average, evaluate SF change
3. On TX: lookup neighbor SF, use it
4. Parse/emit SF field in announces

## Data structure
struct NeighborSF {
  current_sf: u8,       // SF7-SF12
  snr_ewma: i8,         // exponential weighted moving average
  upgrade_count: u8,    // consecutive samples above threshold
  downgrade_count: u8,  // consecutive samples below threshold
}

## Python
- Add to GradientEntry or separate NeighborTable
- SF selection in TX path

## Rust
- Add SF tracking to neighbor state
- Wire to radio TX

## Zephyr
- Add to gradient table struct
- Kconfig: CONFIG_LICHEN_ADAPTIVE_SF_ENABLED
- Default SF: CONFIG_LICHEN_DEFAULT_SF=10
close_reason: Implemented per-neighbor SF tracking across impls; sub-beads filed and closed; changes committed
